sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44474" key="eu)meta/rreustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐμετά-ρρευστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44474.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily diverted from its course</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χυμός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.57</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (-<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ρυστός</foreign> ed.).</sense> </entryFree>
